Task Instruction: Establish a new discussion platform called 'VirtualRealityVanguard'. It should serve as a cutting-edge forum where VR aficionados can engage in conversations about the newest trends, games, and applications in the virtual reality realm. Please ensure the sidebar features the following tags: virtual reality, technology, trends, gaming. Task Instruction: Which are the top 5 items with the highest sales in June 2022?
